title: ficus calyptroceras var. elliotiana
intro: Ficus calyptroceras var. elliotiana, also known as the Elliot's fig or Ficus elliptic, is a variety of fig tree native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its leaves are used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Ficus calyptroceras var. elliotiana include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or ointment for skin conditions.
